positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range cresting over a calm lake at sunrise. The composition features sharp, geometric peaks silhouetted against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo, warm peach, and luminous yellow. In the foreground, a lone, stylized river otter rests on smooth river stones, looking out at the vista. The art style is minimalist vector illustration mixed with neo-geometric linework, highly contrasted, designed for screen printing on apparel. Use strong, solid blocks of color and negative space to emphasize the silhouette and the grandeur of nature. The overall feeling is serene, adventurous, and aspirational. --ar 1:1
